fields.label: Stripe Price ID
fields.name: stripe_price_id
fields.instructions: The Price ID from the Stripe Dashboard (starts with price_). Auto-populated by the pull-cards sync command.

fields.label: Stripe Product ID
fields.name: stripe_product_id
fields.instructions: The Product ID from Stripe (starts with prod_). Auto-populated by the pull-cards sync command.

fields.label: Display Price
fields.name: price
fields.instructions: Display price shown on the storefront. Stripe is the source of truth for the actual charge. Auto-populated by sync.

fields.label: Sale Price
fields.name: sale_price
fields.instructions: Display sale price. Auto-populated by sync when sale_price_id is set in Stripe metadata.

fields.label: Sale Stripe Price ID
fields.name: sale_price_id
fields.instructions: The Stripe Price ID for the sale price. When present, card is on sale. Auto-populated by sync.

fields.label: SKU
fields.name: sku
fields.instructions: Optional stock-keeping unit for internal tracking.

fields.label: Cost Per Unit
fields.name: cost
fields.instructions: Per-unit cost. Auto-populated by sync from Stripe cost metadata. Used for margin calculation.

fields.label: Stock Quantity
fields.name: stock_quantity
fields.instructions: Number of copies available. Decremented automatically on successful payment.

fields.label: Language
fields.name: language
fields.instructions: Card language (e.g., English, Japanese).

fields.label: Game
fields.name: game
fields.instructions: Game slug (e.g., pokemon, yugioh, magic, one-piece). Also duplicated to the Card Game taxonomy.

fields.label: Card Name
fields.name: card_name
fields.instructions: Canonical card name (e.g., Charizard).

fields.label: Card Number
fields.name: card_number
fields.instructions: Number within the set (e.g., 4/102).

fields.label: Set Name
fields.name: set_name
fields.instructions: Human-readable set name (e.g., Base Set). Duplicated to the Card Set taxonomy.

fields.label: Set Code
fields.name: set_code
fields.instructions: Set code/id used by the Pokemon TCG API (e.g., base1).

fields.label: Release Year
fields.name: release_year
fields.instructions: Four-digit release year.

fields.label: Rarity
fields.name: rarity
fields.instructions: Card rarity.

fields.label: Variant
fields.name: variant
fields.instructions: Print variant.

fields.label: Artist
fields.name: artist
fields.instructions: Illustrator credit (optional).

fields.label: Back Image
fields.name: back_image
fields.instructions: Optional reverse-side image for condition verification.

fields.label: Condition
fields.name: condition
fields.instructions: All catalog cards are Near Mint by default. Graded or other conditions use the ad-hoc !sell flow.

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.name: notes
fields.instructions: Internal notes only — not synced, not displayed on the storefront.
